academic_general.summary: General academic base for research talks, course reports, progress reviews, paper explainers, and scholarly exchange.

academic_scqa.summary: Blue-cyan academic and technical report template with Audience-State-Transfer and SCQA body-variant guidance.

defense_leftnav.summary: Compact thesis-defense template with a dynamic left navigation highlight for the current section.

defense_topnav.summary: Source-faithful academic-blue thesis defense template with a dynamic top navigation bar.

literature_minimal.summary: Minimal blue-white literature report and paper-reading template with five reusable classic page shells.
